channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Absa Run Your City Cape Town event cancelled over predicted severe weather and safety risks
item.description: Organisers of the Absa Run Your City 10km series have cancelled the Cape Town leg scheduled for Sunday due to expected hazardous weather conditions, including floods in many parts of the city. After c...

item.title: Senator Mark Kelly Gains National Attention After Legal Dispute with Pentagon
item.description: WASHINGTON: Democratic Senator Mark Kelly has become a prominent figure in US politics following a legal dispute with the Pentagon. Kelly, a retired US Navy officer and former astronaut, faced potenti...

item.title: PGF Clarifies Uzodimma Still Chairman Amid Rumours of Removal
item.description: The Progressive Governors Forum (PGF) don clear ground say all di tori wey dey go round that Imo State Governor, Hope Uzodimma, don comot as chairman na false. People bin talk say during emergency mee...

item.title: Tanzania plans Sh2.4 trillion budget to boost education, skills and innovation
item.description: Tanzania government don announce Sh2.4 trillion budget for 2026/27 financial year wey go put higher education, research, science and innovation at the center of country's long-term economic growth. Ed...

item.title: Federal High Court Rules Sowore Must Face Cyberbullying Case Against President Tinubu
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja, under Justice Mohammed Garba Umar, don dismiss Omoyele Sowore’s no-case submission for the cyberbullying matter wey the Department of State Service (DSS) bring against...

item.title: NRL Round 10: Roosters defeat Titans as Eels lead Cowboys in early clash
item.description: In the 2026 NRL action, the Sydney Roosters secured a convincing 28-12 win over the Gold Coast Titans in an entertaining contest, marking their sixth straight victory of the season. James Tedesco led ...

item.title: BBC searches for new Strictly Come Dancing hosts after Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman depart
item.description: The BBC is currently looking for new hosts for Strictly Come Dancing after longtime presenters Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman left following the 2025 series. According to reports, the corporation has...

item.title: Virginia Supreme Court Rules Democratic Redistricting Plan Unconstitutional, Affecting Midterm Elections
item.description: The Virginia Supreme Court has struck down a voter-approved Democratic congressional redistricting plan, citing procedural violations in how the amendment was placed on the ballot. Voters had narrowly...

item.title: Cowboys hooker Soni Luke leaves field due to leg injury after tackle
item.description: During a recent NRL match, Cowboys hooker Soni Luke was forced to leave the field following an awkward tackle that resulted in a leg injury. The incident occurred as Luke attempted to participate in a...

item.title: Overview of the 48th ASEAN Summit in Cebu Amid Energy Crisis
item.description: The 48th ASEAN Summit convened in Cebu on May 8, 2026, with Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. meeting leaders and representatives from the 11 ASEAN member states at Mactan Island. Due to the o...

item.title: Kenya and World Bank Strengthen Irrigation Programmes to Support Farmers and Food Security
item.description: Kenya and the World Bank are ramping up efforts to expand irrigation projects under the Kenya Sustainable Irrigation for Resilient Economy (K-RISE) programme. This initiative aims to improve food secu...

item.title: Ronaldo scores 100th Saudi League goal as Al Nassr beat Al Shabab 4-2
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo don make another history as e score him 100th goal for Saudi Premier League for Al Nassr win against Al Shabab. The 41-year-old football legend score the third goal for him team duri...

item.title: Tanzanian student with hand disability completes Advanced Level and aims for university
item.description: Hamis Nguku, mwanafunzi kutoka Munga Village, Malinyi District, amemaliza masomo yake ya Advanced Level licha ya kuwa na ulemavu wa mikono. Hamis, aliyezaliwa mikono yake ikiwa paralysed, anatumia mig...

item.title: Man Seriously Injured in Rexdale Stabbing Incident
item.description: A violent stabbing occurred in the Rexdale area of Toronto, leaving a man in life-threatening condition. Local authorities responded promptly to the incident, ensuring the victim was transported to a ...

item.title: Ottawa Experiences Another Day of Below-Average Temperatures
item.description: Residents of Ottawa are expected to experience colder-than-average temperatures for at least one more day, continuing the chilly weather pattern affecting the region. Meteorologists attribute the pers...

item.title: 21-Year-Old Woman Faces Years-Long Struggle with Home Affairs Over Duplicate ID
item.description: Twenty-one-year-old Marvin Mashele’s aspirations to complete her education are being severely disrupted due to a prolonged bureaucratic problem with the Department of Home Affairs. Since 2022, Mashele...

item.title: Pirates Eye Title as Sundowns Slip Points in Premiership Race
item.description: The 2025/26 Betway Premiership title race has entered a crucial phase, with Mamelodi Sundowns leading the table on 65 points from 28 games, and Orlando Pirates just behind on 62 points from 27 games. ...

item.title: Tanzanian Swimmer Crissa Finishes Fourth in 50m Backstroke at African Championships
item.description: Tanzanian swimmer Crissa made the nation proud at the African Swimming Championships held in Algeria by qualifying for the final of the women's 50-metre backstroke and finishing fourth among Africa's ...

item.title: Readers respond to claims linking Marathi pronunciation with caste
item.description: The article discusses a series of readers’ responses to a previous piece in Scroll.in that suggested certain Marathi pronunciations might reflect caste identity. Many readers strongly disagreed, argui...

item.title: Marcos emphasizes regional cooperation on energy and food security at ASEAN Summit
item.description: CEBU, Philippines – Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. opened the 48th ASEAN Summit plenary session on May 8, 2026, with a strong appeal for deeper regional coordination to ensure stable energy...
